title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE KABAYAN CENTRAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF KABAYAN, BENGUET, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO BANSEN MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3636 / 53 OG No. 15, 4777 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1650, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE KABAYAN CENTRAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF KABAYAN, BENGUET, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO BANSEN MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Kabayan Central School in the Municipal District of Kabayan, Benguet, Mountain Province, is hereby changed to Bansen Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
